title: Dramatic School
writer: Ernest Vajda, Mary C. McCall Jr., Hans Székely
actors: Luise Rainer, Paulette Goddard, Alan Marshal
plot: Aspiring actress Louise Mauban attends the prestigious Paris School of Drama during the day and works at a dreary factory assembling gas meters at night. She daydreams and "acts" her way through life, and her fellow students at sc...
